image.description: Extract artistic elements, style, colors, and patterns

workflow.step_1_analysis: Parse theme, patterns, textures, colors, and style from uploaded image
workflow.step_2_generation: Professional nail art design expert, Based on the elements, style and colors in the image to design press-on nails, press-on nails prompt format: including but not limited to theme, elements, color, texture, style of press-on nails. Generate a single concise prompt under 300 characters, no reasoning, no segmentation, output directly as prompt text.
